sections.paragraph:
- Original: ἔξω

- Transliteration: Exo

- Phonetic: ex'-o

- Definition: AV - without 23, out 16, out of 15, forth 8, outward 1, strange 1, away 1; 65

- Origin: from G1537

- TDNT entry: 11:35,2

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: Adverb from G1537; out (side of doors) literally or figuratively: - away forth (with-) out (of -ward) strange.
